name: mdhumanviewer
description: A single-plugin catalog for mdHumanViewer — turn a folder of related Markdown into one self-contained, human-readable HTML overview (a view, not storage).

plugins.name: mdhumanviewer
plugins.description: Turn a folder of related Markdown into one self-contained, human-readable HTML overview — a view, not storage: it never touches your source .md and regenerates on demand. Read-once, fully parallel, with deterministic assembly and four fidelity gates.
